title: Best VPN for Netherlands in 2026: Privacy, Speed, and Streaming
description: The Netherlands sits inside the Nine Eyes alliance and requires ISPs to log metadata. These are the best VPNs for Dutch users who want privacy, fast speeds, and access to geo-blocked content.
content:
Quick answer: NordVPN is the best VPN for the Netherlands in 2026. It has servers in Amsterdam and Rotterdam, a Deloitte-audited no-logs policy, and reliably unblocks Netflix US and Dutch streaming services abroad. ExpressVPN is the fastest option for streaming. ProtonVPN offers the best free tier with no data cap. Mullvad is the top pick for users who want full anonymity with no email required.

Why Dutch Users Need a VPN in 2026

The Netherlands is part of the Nine Eyes intelligence-sharing alliance alongside the US, UK, Canada, Australia, France, Denmark, Norway, and New Zealand. Dutch law requires internet service providers to retain connection metadata for up to 12 months. The government's intelligence agency AIVD runs surveillance programs under the Intelligence and Security Services Act (Wiv 2017), which was expanded in 2023 to include bulk data collection.

For everyday users, this means your ISP can see which websites you visit, when you visit them, and how long you stay. A VPN encrypts that traffic, routing it through a server in another country before it reaches its destination. Your ISP sees only that you are connected to a VPN, not what you are doing.

There are four common reasons Dutch users turn to VPNs:

  • Privacy from ISP logging under Dutch data retention law
  • Accessing Dutch content abroad when traveling outside the Netherlands
  • Reaching international streaming libraries such as Netflix US, which has a larger catalog than Netflix NL
  • Securing public Wi-Fi at airports, hotels, and cafes

The 4 Best VPNs for the Netherlands

1. NordVPN: Best Overall for Dutch Users

NordVPN runs servers in Amsterdam and Rotterdam, giving you low-latency connections within the Netherlands and a Dutch IP address for accessing NPO Start, Videoland, and RTL XL when abroad. It uses the NordLynx protocol (built on WireGuard), which is currently the fastest VPN protocol available.

Key facts:

  • No-logs policy audited by Deloitte (2022, 2023, 2024)
  • Dutch server locations: Amsterdam, Rotterdam
  • Unblocks: Netflix US, BBC iPlayer, Disney+, NPO Start, Videoland
  • Price: from €3.09/month on a 2-year plan
  • 30-day money-back guarantee
  • App available in Dutch

NordVPN also includes Threat Protection Pro, which blocks ads, trackers, and malware at the DNS level, even when you are not connected to the VPN. That makes it more than a VPN: it functions as a basic security layer for your whole device.

One downside: the cheapest plans do not include the full Threat Protection feature, only the lite version. And like most commercial VPNs, it is subscription-based, so the price goes up significantly when your initial plan expires.

2. ExpressVPN: Best for Streaming Speed

ExpressVPN has been the benchmark for streaming performance for years. Its Lightway protocol (proprietary, open-source) consistently delivers fast speeds even on long-distance server connections like Netherlands to US. It has servers in Amsterdam and handles Netflix US, Disney+, BBC iPlayer, and local Dutch services reliably.

Key facts:

  • No-logs policy audited by KPMG (independent)
  • Dutch server location: Amsterdam
  • Fastest VPN for mobile streaming in most independent speed tests
  • Price: from €6.67/month on a 1-year plan (more expensive than NordVPN)
  • 30-day money-back guarantee
  • Works on routers (manual setup or ExpressVPN router app)

The main drawback is cost. ExpressVPN does not offer 2-year plans, so the effective monthly price is higher than NordVPN. If budget matters, NordVPN offers comparable performance at a lower price.

3. ProtonVPN: Best Free VPN for Netherlands

ProtonVPN is the only major VPN with a genuinely useful free tier: no data cap, no ads, no selling of your data. The free plan is slower (limited to servers in the US, Netherlands, and Japan) and cannot be used for streaming, but it is legitimate privacy protection at no cost.

Key facts:

  • Based in Switzerland, outside EU data retention requirements
  • Free plan: unlimited data, 3 server locations (including Netherlands), no streaming
  • Paid plan: all servers, streaming, Stealth protocol, €4.99/month (1-year)
  • Open-source apps, independently audited
  • No credit card required for free plan

For users who only want basic privacy protection on a budget, ProtonVPN Free is the honest recommendation. The Switzerland jurisdiction means your data is not subject to EU or Nine Eyes requirements.

4. Mullvad: Best for Anonymity

Mullvad requires no email address to sign up. You receive an account number and that is it. Payment can be made with cash sent by post, Monero, or Bitcoin, in addition to standard card and PayPal. No personal information is stored at signup or during use.

Key facts:

  • No email required, no account details stored
  • Accepts cash, Monero, Bitcoin payments
  • Flat price: €5/month regardless of plan length
  • Dutch servers: Amsterdam
  • WireGuard and OpenVPN supported
  • No streaming optimization, no smart DNS

Mullvad is not the easiest VPN to set up and does not hold your hand with a polished interface. It is built for users who understand what they want and prioritize anonymity over convenience. For streaming or everyday usability, NordVPN or ExpressVPN is a better fit.

Accessing Dutch Streaming Services Abroad

If you leave the Netherlands and want to watch NPO Start, Videoland, or RTL XL, you need a Dutch IP address. Connect to a Dutch server in your VPN app before opening the streaming service. NordVPN and ExpressVPN both unblock these services reliably. ProtonVPN's paid plan also works.

Note that some Dutch streaming services verify your location with more than just your IP address. If you get a geo-block error even with a Dutch VPN server, try clearing your browser cookies or using the service's app rather than the browser version.

Accessing International Content from the Netherlands

Netflix NL has a smaller library than Netflix US, typically around 3,200 titles versus 5,800+ in the US. Connecting to a US VPN server gives you access to the American library. Both NordVPN and ExpressVPN work with Netflix US from Netherlands consistently.

Other popular use cases from the Netherlands:

  • BBC iPlayer: connect to a UK server (NordVPN, ExpressVPN both work)
  • Hulu: US server, NordVPN and ExpressVPN both unblock it
  • Disney+: NL catalog is smaller than US; US server gives more titles
  • Amazon Prime Video: UK or US server for a larger selection

Are VPNs Legal in the Netherlands?

Yes. VPNs are fully legal in the Netherlands. There are no government restrictions on VPN use for privacy, streaming, or general browsing. Dutch law does not restrict the use of encryption tools. Using a VPN for illegal activities remains illegal regardless of the VPN, but the tool itself is permitted. The Dutch Data Protection Authority (Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens) has no regulations targeting VPN use by consumers.

What to Look for in a VPN for the Netherlands

When choosing a VPN as a Dutch user, these five criteria matter most:

  1. Dutch server locations: you need at least one server in Amsterdam for low-latency connections and a Dutch IP for accessing local content abroad.
  2. Audited no-logs policy: the VPN provider should have had its no-logs claim verified by an independent auditor. All four recommendations above have done this.
  3. WireGuard protocol: the fastest and most modern VPN protocol, significantly faster than OpenVPN. NordVPN, Mullvad, and ProtonVPN all support it natively.
  4. Streaming reliability: if you use streaming services, check whether the VPN actively maintains compatibility with Netflix, Disney+, and Dutch services. NordVPN and ExpressVPN are consistently reliable.
  5. Jurisdiction: Swiss jurisdiction (ProtonVPN, Mullvad) places you outside EU data retention requirements. Panama (NordVPN) and British Virgin Islands (ExpressVPN) also sit outside major surveillance jurisdictions.

Free VPNs for the Netherlands: What to Avoid

Most free VPNs for Netherlands users monetize their services by logging your browsing data and selling it to advertisers, which directly defeats the privacy purpose. Avoid free VPNs that do not publish a clear no-logs policy backed by an audit. Specific services to avoid include Hola VPN (which sells your unused bandwidth as a proxy to third parties), HotSpot Shield's free tier (data caps, ads), and any VPN without a published privacy policy.

The only safe free VPN for the Netherlands is ProtonVPN Free. It is slower than the paid plans and lacks streaming access, but it does not log or sell your data.

VPN for Public Wi-Fi in the Netherlands

Dutch airports (Schiphol), train stations, and hotel networks are standard public Wi-Fi environments where traffic can be intercepted by other users on the same network. Any of the four VPNs above will encrypt your traffic on public Wi-Fi. Enable the kill switch feature (available in all four) so your traffic stops if the VPN connection drops unexpectedly, rather than falling back to unencrypted browsing.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the best VPN for the Netherlands in 2026?

NordVPN is the best overall pick. It covers Dutch server locations, has an audited no-logs policy, and handles streaming well. ExpressVPN is faster for streaming but more expensive.

Is using a VPN legal in the Netherlands?

Yes. VPNs are fully legal in the Netherlands. No government restrictions apply to VPN use for privacy or general browsing.

What is the best free VPN for the Netherlands?

ProtonVPN Free. No data cap, no ads, no data selling, and a Netherlands server is included on the free plan.

Can I use a VPN to watch Dutch TV abroad?

Yes. Connect to a Dutch VPN server and open NPO Start, Videoland, or RTL XL. NordVPN and ExpressVPN both work reliably for this.

Does the Netherlands monitor internet traffic?

ISPs must retain connection metadata under Dutch law. The country is also in the Nine Eyes intelligence alliance. A VPN prevents your ISP from seeing which sites you visit.

Which VPN is best for Netflix US from the Netherlands?

NordVPN and ExpressVPN both work reliably. Netflix NL has roughly 3,200 titles while Netflix US has 5,800+. A US server switches you to the American library automatically.

What is the most anonymous VPN for Netherlands users?

Mullvad. No email required, accepts cash and crypto, no user data stored. ProtonVPN (Swiss jurisdiction) is second for anonymity.
